data.body: FIX RESULT: Root cause confirmed. Claude Code plugin system classifies SKILL.md files as 'skills' (with Skill tool content injection) only when they have 'allowed-tools' in YAML frontmatter. 29 of 32 SKILL.md files lacked this field → loaded as 'agents' → Skill tool returned 'Launching skill: X' without content injection. Fix applied: added 'allowed-tools:' field to all 29 SKILL.md files. RED test added: tests/plugin/test_skill_allowed_tools.py (32 parametrized cases). All existing tests passing (80/80 plugin tests, wrapper parity, skill path refs, fix-bug skill). After cache sync (/reload-plugins), all 32 skills will be classified as proper skills.
